name: Mixed Reality Museum | By Halo AR - Educational learning exhibits w/ AI teaching

reviews.review_description: Really enjoying the app. A couple of requests/improvements would be appreciated. Would it be possible to manipulate the objects ( move them out of fixed location)? Also the information screen  and videos crowd the objects too much ( thus being able to move the object would be beneficial). Thanks for making this, very enjoyable!

developer_response.body: We're glad to hear you're enjoying it. Thank you for those great suggestions. We'll continue to work hard to balance simplicity vs. functionality, and hope to add more to the latter category over time!

reviews.review_description: I think this app is really good and I really like the way you can now enlarge and rotate objects. Some good additional information as well. I noticed on one screen the additional information seemed to be in a different ace that was  a bit awkward to point at but overall I found this app to be very interesting. I hope it is developed further.
Great app. Mind blown. Please add more exhibits or make a paid version which would be worth the money. Top quality app. Better than a lot of paid apps.

developer_response.body: What high praise. Thanks for making our day!
